title: Silence Occasionally Broken by...
description: Uses the "Silence Occasionally Broken by..." concept but with Minecraft sounds!
body:
# Silence Occasionally Broken by... (SOB) --- **SOB** is a **datapack** that plays **sounds** at **random** moments to make the game a tad more **fun**! ## Config To open the config you need to be an Operator and do `/function sob:config` ![SOB config](https://github.com/El-Kavio/SOB/assets/140896938/9112852c-3682-4f7b-8347-32f447a1f2a4) > Sounds are disabled by default. ## Note Each sound will play on average 5 times an hour. > Can be modified in the **playsound.mcfunction**.
How to update Simply **delete** the **SOB** folder and **replace** it with the **new** one!
--- [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kavio)
